/CAL: MOTION TO RETURN PROPERTY/X: RONNIE WAGNER, WITH THE S,F,P,D, LEGALDEPT,, IS PRESENT IN COURT,/MO GRTD/X: COURT FINDS GOOD CAUSE TO GRANT THE MOTION AND FINDS THAT THE COMPASSIONATE USE ACT APPLIES,/CTORD: SEVEN ZIPLOC BAGGIES OF SUSPECTED MARIJUANA (5 GRAMS GROSS WEIGHT) AND  SUSPECTED MARIJUANA (4,1 GRAMS GROSS WEIGHT) ORDERED RETURNED TO THE MOVING PARTY/CTORD: ALL COCAINE BASE & METHAMPHETAMINE SEIZED IN CONNECTION WITH THIS CASEDESTROYED BY S,F,P,D/X: ORDERS SIGNED AND FILED IN OPEN COURT,/
